title: Gauravaram Heat Wave
lead: Gauravaram is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.17. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Gauravaram is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 49%, and the wind speed is barely 0.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of wind and high temperatures are making the outdoor conditions unbearable, with a significant impact on daily life and activities.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
